DataBind.SQL: SELECT dialsetting.Guid, dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseType AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseTypeSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != @DeletedState ORDER BY dial.OrderValue ASC

DefaultDataSource.SQL: SELECT [GUID] AS ITSMKnowledgeBaseTypeGuid FROM usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseTypeSetting WHERE FunctionalKey = 'user' AND [State] != @DeletedState

TimeLineDataBind.SQL: SET @Result = ( SELECT dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseType AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseTypeSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != 0 AND CAST(dialsetting.Guid AS VARCHAR(MAX)) = @Value )

DataBind.SQL:
DECLARE @CreateNewTag_ITSM NVARCHAR(MAX) = usr.GetResourceText('CreateNewTagITSMLabelIDs_ITSM', @UserLanguageID)
SELECT CONCAT('##%%' ,@ITSMLabelIDs, '%%##') AS ID, CONCAT('', @CreateNewTag_ITSM, ': ', @ITSMLabelIDs) AS Title WHERE @ITSMLabelIDs IS NOT NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSMLabel AS ticLab WHERE ticLab.[State] != @DeletedState AND ticLab.[TextValue] = @ITSMLabelIDs )
UNION ALL
SELECT CAST(ticLab.[ID] AS VARCHAR(255)) AS ID ,ticLab.[TextValue] AS Title FROM usr.ITSMLabel AS ticLab WHERE ticLab.[State] != @DeletedState AND ticLab.[TextValue] LIKE '%' + @ITSMLabelIDs + '%'

SelectedDataBind.SQL: SELECT ticLab.[ID] AS [ID] ,ticLab.[TextValue] AS Title FROM usr.ITSMLabel AS ticLab INNER JOIN @ITSMLabelIDs AS ticLabIDs ON ticLabIDs.ID = ticLab.ID

DataSource.SQL: SELECT ISNULL(dial.ID, (ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY dial.ID ASC)) * -1) AS ID ,dial.Title ,dial.Content ,lan.ID AS LanguageID FROM dbo.[Language] AS lan LEFT JOIN ( SELECT dial.ID, dial.Title, dial.Content, dial.LanguageID FROM usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseSetting AS dialSetting LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMKnowledgeBase AS dial ON dial.[State] != @DeletedState AND dial.Guid = dialSetting.Guid WHERE dialSetting.ID = @ID ) AS dial ON dial.LanguageID = lan.ID ORDER BY lan.ID ASC

SELECT fot.Ident AS CommonFolderTreeIdent ,fotAgg.FolderNames AS CommonFolderTreeIdentName FROM dbo.FolderTree as fot INNER JOIN dbo.Folder as fol on fol.ID = fot.FolderID AND fol.[State] = @StateOne OUTER APPLY ( SELECT STRING_AGG(folP.[Name], ' → ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY fotP.Level ASC) AS FolderNames FROM dbo.FolderTree AS fotP INNER JOIN dbo.Folder AS folP ON folP.ID = fotP.FolderID WHERE fot.Ident LIKE fotP.Ident + '%' ) AS fotAgg WHERE fol.FolderGroupSegmentIdent = @FolderGroupSegmentIdent AND fot.[Ident] IN (SELECT ID FROM @CommonFolderTreeIdent)

SELECT itsKbcfsf.ID ,fotAgg.FolderNames AS CommonFolderTreeIdent FROM usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseCommonFolderSubForm as itsKbcfsf OUTER APPLY ( SELECT STRING_AGG(folP.[Name], ' → ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY fotP.Level ASC) AS FolderNames FROM dbo.FolderTree AS fotP INNER JOIN dbo.Folder AS folP ON folP.ID = fotP.FolderID WHERE itsKbcfsf.CommonFolderTreeIdent LIKE fotP.Ident + '%' ) AS fotAgg WHERE itsKbcfsf.TableID = @ID AND itsKbcfsf.FormIdent = @ThisFormIdent AND itsKbcfsf.[State] != @DeletedState

DataBind.SQL: SELECT lan.ID ,lan.[Name] ,IIF(lan.ID = @UserLanguageID, 1, 0) AS Selected FROM dbo.Language AS lan

DataSource.SQL: IF @ShowInLanguageID IS NOT NULL BEGIN SELECT lan.ID AS [Value] ,lan.[Name] AS Title ,IIF(lan.ID = @ShowInLanguageID, 1, 0) AS Selected FROM dbo.Language AS lan END ELSE BEGIN SELECT lan.ID AS [Value] ,lan.[Name] AS Title ,IIF(lan.ID = @UserLanguageID, 1, 0) AS Selected FROM dbo.Language AS lan END

SELECT itsKnb.Title ,itsKnb.Content ,itsLabAgg.TextValues AS ITSMLabelIDs ,itsKbt.TextValue AS ITSMKnowledgeBaseTypeGuid ,creatorAcc.[FullName] AS AccountID ,FORMAT(itsKnbSetting.[CreateDate], 'dd. MM. yyyy', @UICultureCode) AS CreateDate ,lastUpdateAcc.[FullName] AS LastUpdateAccountID ,FORMAT(itsKnbSetting.[LastUpdate], 'dd. MM. yyyy', @UICultureCode) AS UpdateDate FROM usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseSetting AS itsKnbSetting INNER JOIN usr.ITSMKnowledgeBase AS itsKnb ON itsKnb.Guid = itsKnbSetting.Guid AND itsKnb.LanguageID = ISNULL(@ShowInLanguageID, @UserLanguageID) INNER JOIN usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseType AS itsKbt ON itsKbt.Guid = itsKnbSetting.ITSMKnowledgeBaseTypeGuid AND itsKbt.LanguageID = ISNULL(@ShowInLanguageID, @UserLanguageID) OUTER APPLY ( SELECT STRING_AGG(itsLab.TextValue, ', ') AS TextValues FROM dbo.MultiSelect AS mus INNER JOIN usr.ITSMLabel AS itsLab ON itsLab.ID = TRY_CAST(mus.[Value] AS INT) WHERE mus.TableID = itsKnbSetting.ID AND mus.FormIdent = 'ITSMKnowledgeBaseSetting' AND mus.ControlIdent = 'ITSMLabelIDs' ) AS itsLabAgg LEFT JOIN dbo.Account AS creatorAcc ON creatorAcc.ID = itsKnbSetting.AccountID LEFT JOIN dbo.Account AS lastUpdateAcc ON lastUpdateAcc.ID = itsKnbSetting.LastUpdateAccountID WHERE itsKnbSetting.[ID] = @ID

SELECT fil.ID ,fil.TableID ,fil.FormIdent ,fil.[Name] ,fil.[Extension] ,fil.[DataGuid] ,fil.[Size] ,CASE UPPER(fil.[Extension]) WHEN 'CSS' THEN 'ph-file-css' WHEN 'CSV' THEN 'ph-file-csv'
WHEN 'DOC' THEN 'ph-file-doc' WHEN 'DOCX' THEN 'ph-file-doc'
WHEN 'HTML' THEN 'ph-file-html'
WHEN 'APNG' THEN 'ph-file-image' WHEN 'PNG' THEN 'ph-file-image' WHEN 'AVIF' THEN 'ph-file-image' WHEN 'GIF' THEN 'ph-file-image' WHEN 'JPEG' THEN 'ph-file-jpg' WHEN 'JPG' THEN 'ph-file-jpg' WHEN 'JFIF' THEN 'ph-file-jpg' WHEN 'PJPEG' THEN 'ph-file-jpg' WHEN 'PJP' THEN 'ph-file-jpg' WHEN 'PNG' THEN 'ph-file-png' WHEN 'WEBP' THEN 'ph-file-image'
WHEN 'PDF' THEN 'ph-file-pdf'
WHEN 'PPT' THEN 'ph-file-ppt' WHEN 'RS' THEN 'ph-file-rs' WHEN 'TS' THEN 'ph-file-ts' WHEN 'TSX' THEN 'ph-file-tsx' WHEN 'VUE' THEN 'ph-file-vue'
WHEN 'XLS' THEN 'ph-file-xls' WHEN 'XLSX' THEN 'ph-file-xls'
WHEN 'ZIP' THEN 'ph-file-zip'
WHEN 'MP3' THEN 'ph-file-audio' WHEN 'OGG' THEN 'ph-file-audio' WHEN 'WAV' THEN 'ph-file-audio'
WHEN 'MP4' THEN 'ph-file-video' WHEN 'WEBM' THEN 'ph-file-video' WHEN 'AVI' THEN 'ph-file-video' WHEN 'FLV' THEN 'ph-file-video' WHEN 'MOV' THEN 'ph-file-video' WHEN 'WMV' THEN 'ph-file-video'
WHEN 'XML' THEN 'ph-file-text' WHEN 'MD' THEN 'ph-file-text' WHEN 'TXT' THEN 'ph-file-text' WHEN 'SQL' THEN 'ph-file-text'
ELSE 'ph-file' END AS [IconCssClass] ,CASE UPPER(fil.[Extension]) WHEN 'CSS' THEN '#214ce5' WHEN 'CSV' THEN '#088e32'
WHEN 'DOC' THEN '#325b9d' WHEN 'DOCX' THEN '#325b9d'
WHEN 'HTML' THEN '#e5532d'
WHEN 'APNG' THEN '#ff417b' WHEN 'PNG' THEN '#ff417b' WHEN 'AVIF' THEN '#bd2c61' WHEN 'GIF' THEN '#3e8bcb' WHEN 'JPEG' THEN '#ee7e86' WHEN 'JPG' THEN '#ee7e86' WHEN 'JFIF' THEN '#ee7e86' WHEN 'PJPEG' THEN '#ee7e86' WHEN 'PJP' THEN '#ee7e86' WHEN 'PNG' THEN '#ff417b' WHEN 'WEBP' THEN '#6cbc2b'
WHEN 'PDF' THEN '#b61308'
WHEN 'PPT' THEN '#d24a2b' WHEN 'RS' THEN '#080808' WHEN 'TS' THEN '#087670' WHEN 'TSX' THEN '#087670' WHEN 'VUE' THEN '#08bb7c'
WHEN 'XLS' THEN '#15763e' WHEN 'XLSX' THEN '#15763e'
WHEN 'ZIP' THEN '#febf08'
WHEN 'MP3' THEN '#6fb9ef' WHEN 'OGG' THEN '#1f7eb0' WHEN 'WAV' THEN '#c0257f'
WHEN 'MP4' THEN '#0a88c4' WHEN 'WEBM' THEN '#6dbc21' WHEN 'AVI' THEN '#3998d2' WHEN 'FLV' THEN '#af1209' WHEN 'MOV' THEN '#238dc2' WHEN 'WMV' THEN '#429ad0'
WHEN 'XML' THEN '#f4b400' WHEN 'MD' THEN '#f4b400' WHEN 'TXT' THEN '#f4b400' WHEN 'SQL' THEN '#f4b400'
ELSE '#000000' END AS [IconColor] ,CASE UPPER(fil.[Extension]) WHEN 'PNG' THEN 'Image' WHEN 'JPG' THEN 'Image' WHEN 'GIF' THEN 'Image' WHEN 'JPEG' THEN 'Image' WHEN 'BMP' THEN 'Image' WHEN 'PDF' THEN 'Pdf' WHEN 'XLS' THEN 'MSOffice' WHEN 'XLSX' THEN 'MSOffice' WHEN 'DOCX' THEN 'MSOffice' WHEN 'DOC' THEN 'MSOffice' WHEN 'PPT' THEN 'MSOffice' WHEN 'PPTX' THEN 'MSOffice' ELSE '' END AS FileType
/*FROM dbo.[File] AS fil*/ FROM usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseSetting AS itsKnbSetting INNER JOIN dbo.[File] AS fil ON fil.TableID = itsKnbSetting.ID AND fil.FormIdent = 'ITSMKnowledgeBaseSetting' AND fil.ControlIdent = 'Attachments' AND fil.[State] = @FileActiveState INNER JOIN usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseFileExtension AS itsKbfe ON itsKbfe.ID = fil.ID INNER JOIN dbo.MultiSelect AS mus ON mus.TableID = itsKbfe.ID AND mus.FormIdent = 'ITSMKnowledgeBaseFileExtension' AND mus.ControlIdent = 'LanguageIDs' AND TRY_CAST(mus.[Value] AS INT) = ISNULL(@ShowInLanguageID, @UserLanguageID) WHERE itsKnbSetting.ID = @ID

Section.HTMLTemplate:
[#Categorization_ITSM#]
[#LanguageMutations_ITSM#]
[#Setting_ITSM#]
